use_cases: Creating and configuring audio shows or podcasts with customizable voice options
Selecting host and guest voices from a dropdown with visual indicators
Choosing audio format styles, quality settings, and languages
Generating audio content through an integrated action button
Managing audio production workflows in a single interface
ai_summary: AudioShowCreator is a composite form component for configuring audio content creation, featuring dropdown selectors for voices, languages, format styles, and audio quality settings. Built with Framer Motion animations and Lucide icons, it provides a clean interface for podcast and audio show production workflows, combining card layouts with tabbed navigation and customizable select inputs.
